title: Atlas Expansion V: Domains 526-555 (Biology, Economics & Social Sciences)

D526.name: Mendelian genetics
D526.reason: Discrete allele inheritance; Punnett square = EML-0

D527.name: Population genetics (Hardy-Weinberg)
D527.reason: Allele frequency p²+2pq+q²: real measurement = EML-2

D530.name: Game theory in biology (ESS)
D530.reason: Fitness payoff matrix; Nash equilibrium = EML-2 real

D531.name: Lotka-Volterra equations
D531.reason: dx/dt = x(a-by): exponential growth terms = EML-1

D534.name: Genome-wide association (GWAS)
D534.reason: Effect size; p-value = real measurement = EML-2

D535.name: Protein folding (thermodynamics)
D535.reason: ΔG = -kT ln Z: free energy = EML-1 (log partition)

D536.name: Protein structure prediction (AlphaFold)
D536.reason: Deep neural net; non-constructive ground state = EML-∞

D537.name: Neural networks / deep learning
D537.reason: σ(Wx+b) with exp in softmax; backprop = EML-1

D539.name: Generative AI (diffusion models)
D539.reason: Score function ∇log p(x): logarithmic gradient = EML-1

D540.name: Reinforcement learning (Bellman equation)
D540.reason: Q(s,a) = r + γ max Q': recursive real; discount = EML-1

D541.name: General equilibrium theory (Arrow-Debreu)
D541.reason: Market clearing; discrete commodity bundle = EML-0

D544.name: Black-Scholes option pricing
D544.reason: C = S·N(d₁) - K·exp(-rT)·N(d₂): single exp = EML-1

D545.name: Stochastic calculus (Itô)
D545.reason: dX = μdt + σdW: real Brownian = EML-2

D547.name: CAPM (Capital Asset Pricing Model)
D547.reason: E[r] = rf + β(E[rm]-rf): real linear = EML-2

D548.name: Prospect theory (Kahneman-Tversky)
D548.reason: Value function v(x) ~ x^α: EML-1 (power law via log)

D550.name: Auction theory (optimal auctions)
D550.reason: Virtual valuation ψ(v) = v - (1-F)/f: real = EML-2

D552.name: Agent-based modeling
D552.reason: Emergent behavior; no closed form = EML-∞

D555.name: Epidemics on networks
D555.reason: SIR on graph; threshold R₀: EML-1 exponential spread

summary.new_theorem: T144: Atlas Batch 5 (S424): 30 bio/econ/social domains; ML = EML-1

verdicts.economics: Black-Scholes: EML-1; Nash/CAPM: EML-2; Arrow-Debreu/mechanism design: EML-0

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 5 (T144, S424): 30 bio/econ/social domains. Machine learning (neural nets, transformers, diffusion, RL): all EML-1 (softmax = exp normalization). Black-Scholes: EML-1 (exp(-rT)); Nash equilibrium: EML-2 (payoff real); Arrow-Debreu: EML-0 (discrete commodity). AlphaFold, agent-based models, complexity economics: EML-∞ (non-constructive). 0 violations. Total domains: 565.
rabbit_hole_log: ML family: all EML-1 (softmax=exp/sum; backprop=chain rule on logs)
NEW: T144 Atlas Batch 5 — 30 domains, 0 violations, total 565
